hero_subtitle: SFTY delivers a unified compliance control layer that helps executives reduce operational risk through audit-ready workflows and consolidated visibility across teams and providers.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to maintain clear operational control when compliance activities are spread across disconnected providers and manual processes. This limits visibility into risk, slows decision-making, and weakens audit readiness for regulated digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes compliance data, case workflows, provider outputs and audit evidence into a unified platform, empowering leadership with clear visibility and control over operational risk and decision traceability.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to operational decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider-generated checks through rules, reviews, cases and evidence to support structured operational risk controls and audit-ready decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides executives a unified compliance layer that connects workflows, decisions and audit evidence to reduce operational risk and improve oversight clarity.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leadership with operational controls, audit-ready evidence and compliance orchestration to enhance risk visibility, bank due diligence and scalable deployment governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support executive operational risk controls
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows help manage operational risk
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports compliance decision reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY improves risk visibility for VASP executives
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance control layer that improves visibility, reduces operational risk, and strengthens auditability across digital asset workflows and compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure operational risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures fragmented compliance checks into connected cases, decision logs, regulatory rule updates and evidence packages for controlled and auditable operational risk management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider outputs and evidence packages to support audit readiness and clear regulatory review trails.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects to KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, and reporting providers without replacing them, layering workflows on existing compliance infrastructure.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY sits above existing providers to connect outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule or screening tools.
final_title: Build operational controls around compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports audit-ready workflows, risk visibility and scalable compliance controls for executives at regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
